If 20 students do not have desktop computers, and this number represents one-third of the students who do not have either a desktop or a laptop computer at home, how many students are there at that grade level?" The assistant solved correctly. No disobey.

Thus answer: A. summary: The assistant correctly solved the problem, verified conditions, no issues. B. yes. C. all no.
